highlights.title: Bayaan is now Open Source
highlights.description: Bayaan is now AGPL-3.0 and on GitHub. Star the repo, report issues, or open a pull request. Link in Settings › About Bayaan

highlights.title: 7 More Rewayat
highlights.description: Read the mushaf in Warsh, Qalun, Al-Bazzi, Qunbul, Shu'bah, Al-Duri, and Al-Susi alongside Hafs, with per-letter and whole-word diff highlighting

highlights.title: Rewayah Everywhere
highlights.description: The player renders verse text in the currently-playing rewayah, saved bookmarks remember which rewayah they were made in, and a toast tells you when it switches

highlights.title: Share Anything
highlights.description: New share buttons on verses, surahs, mushaf pages, reciters, recitations, adhkar, and dhikr. Deep links open straight back into the app

highlights.title: Surahs Tab
highlights.description: A dedicated tab for the whole mushaf, with juz groupings and a continue-reading hero that remembers where you left off

features: Bayaan is now open source at github.com/thebayaan/Bayaan under AGPL-3.0; a new Contribute on GitHub link in Settings › About Bayaan opens the repo
7 new rewayat with full mushaf text and diff highlighting: Shu'bah, Al-Bazzi, Qunbul, Warsh, Qalun, Al-Duri (Abu Amr), Al-Susi. 8 rewayat with text in total, Hafs included
Canonical rewayah identity module with support for all 20 qira'at narrations; the 12 text-less rewayat appear in the picker as audio-only entries
Rewayah-aware player: verse text renders in the currently-playing rewayah; bookmarks, notes, highlights, and share URLs carry the rewayah stamp
Char-level tajweed highlights for Warsh/Qalun (madd al-badal, tashil, ibdal, taghliz al-lam, silah) plus whole-word mukhtalif tinting for Al-Duri/Al-Susi
"Now reading" toast when the currently-playing track's rewayah transitions
Consistent foreground diff highlighting across paginated mushaf, vertical mushaf, and list modes. Previously only the paginated view painted them
Collapsible accordion for the rewayat picker in mushaf settings with the diff toggle promoted above it; color legend disclosure per rewayah
Shareable deep links for verses, surahs, mushaf pages, reciters, recitations, adhkar super-categories, and individual dhikr. All open back into the app
Share buttons in player options, surah options, verse actions, mushaf header, adhkar index, dhikr screen, and the recent-reciter long-press sheet
Theme-aware Open Graph images (light/dark) generated server-side with custom fonts for surah and verse share links
New Surahs tab with juz groupings, continue-reading hero that resumes at your last-read page, and shared gradient-mesh styling with the hero
Listening insights: anonymous PostHog analytics (30s/10% meaningful-listen threshold) with opt-out, Sentry crash reporting, local MMKV aggregation for offline events
Bayaan backend API integration for reciter catalog. App now pulls from api.thebayaan.com with a local bundled fallback and cache
Community-fork friendly: app runs without an API key using the bundled fallback catalog
iOS 26 Liquid Glass treatment for the search-tab browse tiles
Cross-platform network-status toasts on connection loss, recovery, and backend-fallback transitions. Replaces the persistent pill banner
Share recent-played recitation from the reciter long-press sheet with reciter + surah + rewayah context
improvements: iOS 26 polish pass: inset handling across scroll views, search-keyboard edge cases, surah-card cleanup
Mini-player auto-collapses on scroll in the mushaf-settings and search tabs (iOS 26)
Adhkar cards now show titles below the artwork with sharper corners, preserving the home-screen vertical rhythm
Clearer 'Add reciter to favorites' vs 'Add to loved' labels in the recent-reciter sheet; heart icon for loved is bigger
Review and Learn About icons render at full text color (were previously dimmed by hardcoded opacity)
Adhkar See More button, rewayah-aware navigation context, and canonical category ordering
Rewayah displayed in mushaf header meta
Quran tab icon resized for visual balance
Cached reciter data is used immediately on startup (no blank state while the API responds)
fixes: Recovered users stuck on a stale pre-canonical rewayah slug ("qaloon", "shouba", etc.) where the mushaf would fail to load
Android toasts now show the full text instead of dropping the subtitle line
Explore-tab bento tiles no longer double-pad under the iOS 26 search bar
Share sheet from the recent-reciter options no longer conflicts with the dismissing action sheet
Fixed 4 codepoints that weren't in the DigitalKhatt font (substituted cleanly)
Android crash on setColorScheme(null); settings top-inset fix
Adhkar header styling and settings-screen scroll behavior
What's New onboarding now filters by version
TrackInfo navigation cleanup and hydration timeout fallback
Floating player, player-sheet header, and upload UI refinements
technical: License switched from Apache 2.0 + Commons Clause to AGPL-3.0-or-later; added TRADEMARKS.md separating code license from brand protection
Open-source governance files added; bundled reciters.json removed (streams from API instead); unused fonts removed
Cloudflare R2 audio CDN migration with slug-based URL resolution and cache-busting backwards compatibility
Analytics infrastructure: PostHog SDK + device-ID generation + event schema + local aggregation + meaningful-listen tracking
Analytics killswitch + privacy manifest + build hardening
Shared RewayahDiffService.getRewayahRuleMapForLine / getRewayahRuleMapForWords consumed by all three mushaf renderers
Defensive migratePersistedId guards in DigitalKhattDataService and MushafPreloadService init paths so corrupted persisted slugs self-heal
Normalized alef/yeh variants in the mukhtalif classifier; multi-category tajweed classifier for far rewayat
ApiDisruptionBanner replaced by NetworkStatusMonitor: headless, transition-only toast emitter
burnt toast wrapper accepts a preset argument; Android merges title+message into a single line since Toast.makeText only renders one string
Build 697 (iOS); ShareExtension bumped to 2.1.2

highlights.title: Word by Word
highlights.description: Tap any word to see its meaning, transliteration, and grammar right in the mushaf or player

highlights.title: Translations & Tafseer
highlights.description: Browse dozens of translations and scholarly commentaries in multiple languages, all downloadable for offline use

highlights.title: Thematic Highlighting
highlights.description: Verses are color-coded by theme so you can see the structure and topics of each surah at a glance

highlights.title: IndoPak Script
highlights.description: Switch to the IndoPak Nastaliq script in the mushaf for the style used across South Asia

highlights.title: The Mushaf
highlights.description: A dedicated reading screen with full Uthmani script, tajweed coloring, and immersive mode

highlights.title: Follow Along
highlights.description: Each ayah highlights in sync with the recitation, available for most reciters

highlights.title: Ambient Sounds
highlights.description: Layer nature soundscapes over your recitation for a focused experience

highlights.title: Verse Interactions
highlights.description: Bookmark, highlight, take notes, copy, and share any verse

highlights.title: Personal Recitations
highlights.description: Import, tag, and organize your own audio recordings

highlights.title: Adhkar (Remembrance)
highlights.description: Complete Hisnul Muslim collection with audio playback and saved favorites

features: Digital Uthmani Mushaf with Skia rendering and tajweed coloring
Ayah-by-ayah timestamp tracking and auto-scroll for 43 reciters
Complete Hisnul Muslim adhkar collection with audio and Play All
8 ambient nature soundscapes with gapless dual-player crossfade
Verse annotations: bookmark, highlight, notes, copy, share
Personal recitations upload with metadata tagging
Immersive reading mode with tap-to-hide chrome
Mushaf audio player with ayah-by-ayah playback
Verse share cards with Skia rendering
Similar verses and shared phrases discovery
Mushaf session restore on app relaunch
Skia surah headers and mushaf-style basmala in player
improvements: New expo-audio engine replacing react-native-track-player
Redesigned search with dual-mode browse/search crossfade
Redesigned reciter profiles with centered layout
Adhkar category card illustrations (dark/light variants)
Mushaf deep-linking by surah, page, or ayah
Lock screen controls with reliable metadata and artwork
fixes: Queue auto-advance and previous button reliability
Lock screen controls showing empty metadata
Player sheet panning and gesture coordination
Android mushaf gesture conflicts
Verse annotations database race condition
technical: Expo SDK 54 upgrade with full dependency migration
Replaced RNEUI Icon with @expo/vector-icons across 70 files
Migrated TouchableOpacity to Pressable throughout player
Android performance: largeHeap, inline requires, lazy-loading
QuranView scroll optimization with FlashList and memoization
MMKV-based on-demand mushaf layout caching
Timestamps DB shrunk from 117MB to 40MB

highlights.title: Custom Playlists
highlights.description: Create and manage your own playlists

highlights.title: Redesigned Search
highlights.description: Beautiful bento layout with curated system playlists

features: Complete offline download system with progress tracking
Bulk download for playlists and collections
Create, edit, and manage custom playlists
Reorder and delete playlist items
Juz-based surah grouping in browse and reciter screens
Enhanced collection screen with rewayat-aware downloads
Download state indicators throughout the app
Storage management with usage breakdown
Gradient text highlighting for currently playing track
Juz section separators in browse all surahs screen
improvements: Eliminated navigation lag in explore view
Fixed play icon flickering
Optimized button interactions across the app
Significant performance boost for main UI
Improved FloatingPlayer visibility logic
Better audio player state management
Enhanced download performance to prevent freezing
Improved collection and playlist organization
Better touch zones for surah list items
fixes: Resolved TestFlight file corruption issues
Fixed audio playback race conditions
Fixed double-tap bugs
Corrected playback behavior inconsistencies
Fixed download UI freezing during operations
Resolved bottom sheet positioning issues
Fixed various TypeScript type issues
technical: Removed authentication and Supabase dependencies
Refactored download system architecture
Improved code organization and documentation
Updated dependencies for Android compatibility
Enhanced TypeScript type safety
